observation: Dossier bullet 1 (LangChain 1.0 de facto standard, 90M monthly downloads, production customers) cites clm-2026-06-02-004, which has weight 0.75 and verified=false in claims.jsonl. Dossier presents unverified claim as established fact. Stage-discipline gap: unverified claims should be marked NEEDS-MORE-EVIDENCE in dossier prose, not asserted. Underlying sources (src-2026-06-02-003, src-2026-06-02-015) are primary and high-trust, so promotion to verified is achievable but not yet done.

Dossier bullet 8 (Persistent memory is the active research frontier with no clear winner; MemoryArena exposes deep gap) cites clm-2026-06-02-005, which has weight 0.7 and verified=false. Same stage-discipline issue: underling sources (src-2026-06-02-017, src-2026-06-02-018) are primary arXiv surveys, so evidence exists for verification, but ledger state has not been updated. Dossier dresses unverified as confirmed.

Dossier bullet 9 (memory security class — InjecMEM 61.4% / 76.6%, eTAMP, SpAIware) cites clm-2026-06-02-006, which has weight 0.7 and verified=false. Same pattern: dossier asserts, ledger has not promoted. Underlying source src-2026-06-02-018 is a primary arXiv survey. Verification debt is concentrated in this dossier — three of six attached claims are unverified despite primary-source backing.

Implications section line 59 cites clm-2026-06-02-001 (GPT-5.5 frontier) as the basis for a build recommendation. clm-2026-06-02-001 has dossier='frontier_ai', not 'ai_agents'. This is a cross-dossier reference — the ai_agents dossier is borrowing a frontier_ai claim. Not a hard error, but breaks the dossier-as-authoritative-per-topic model. Recommend: link to the frontier_ai dossier rather than citing the foreign claim directly.

GPT-6 rumor (fnd-2026-06-02-026 / src-2026-06-02-021) is explicitly surfaced as a contradiction and routed to verification-review. Mythos and Versept watch items also flagged. This is good practice: low-trust signals (geo.fkw.com, sources.news, YouTube transcript) are not smuggled in as established. Contradiction surface is intact.

Routing history is current and complete: 5 routes on 2026-06-02, all queued and awaiting downstream consumption. Hermes, Mavis, verification, watch lanes all populated. Handoff hygiene is intact. Caveat: 2 Hermes routes pending and 1 Mavis route pending; no observed downstream consumption. Stale-routing SLA not yet violated (24h window), but worth flagging at next audit if still unconsumed.
